cycles.name: C_SETTINGS.1

deliverables.description: Add bypass_version_check setting field to ServerSettings in settings.py
Add PGMCP_BYPASS_VERSION_CHECK env var parsing to Settings.from_env() in settings.py
Add unit tests in test_settings.py verifying default values, custom env var values, and precedence

cycles.exit_criteria: ServerSettings and Settings.from_env() support PGMCP_BYPASS_VERSION_CHECK and PYTEST_CURRENT_TEST.

cycles.name: C_CLI_INIT.2

deliverables.description: Update args.init block in cli.py to write version to resolved_server_root / '.version'
Extend test_cli_init_success in test_cli.py to assert .version file creation and contents

cycles.exit_criteria: pgmcp --init writes server package version to .version in workspace.

cycles.name: C_BOOTSTRAP.3

deliverables.description: Add startup version verification in ServerBootstrapper.bootstrap() in bootstrap.py
Add bootstrap unit tests for missing version, version mismatch, and successful match
Add integration test checking transition to DegradedMCPServer on validation failure

cycles.exit_criteria: Workspace version is validated on bootstrapper startup, transitioning to degraded mode on validation failure.
